title: JSON-native work artifacts: prd.schema.json + issue schema extension
description: Author prd.schema.json (problem, solution, user stories, implementation/testing decisions, out-of-scope, linked issues, status). Extend issue.schema.json: prd linkage field, structured acceptance_criteria, slice_type (HITL/AFK). Convert PRD-001 from markdown to conformant JSON. Line to encode: artifacts agents execute against are JSON; documents humans read for context are markdown. Acceptance: schemas parse; PRD-001.json validates; root schemas/ mirrored from src/.
notes: AFK. Covers PRD-001 stories 8, 9. Biggest structural change per Team Lead. Shipped 2026-06-07 by team-lead (sprint_1 item S1-2; the owner-field schema gap observed at assignment is retro-logged).
